properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: God of Jacob, Great I Am King of angels, Son of Man Voice of many waters Song of Heaven's throne Louder than the thunder Make Your glory known

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Hail, hail Lion of Judah Let the Lion roar Hail, hail Lion of Judah Let the Lion roar Hail, hail Lion of Judah Let the Lion roar Hail, hail Lion of Judah Let the Lion roar!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Pride of Zion, prophets spoke Our Messiah flesh and bone You alone are worthy to open up the scroll Like a lamb, You suffered, but the Lion has arose

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Let it roar, let it roar, let it roar Let the Lion roar

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Prepare the way Prepare the way of the Lord Prepare the way Prepare the way of the Lord Prepare the way Prepare the way of the Lord Prepare the way Prepare the way of the Lord

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: O valley, be raised up O mountain, be made low O valley, be raised up O mountain, be made low O valley, be raised up O mountain, be made low O valley, be raised up O mountain, be made low

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: O valley, be raised up O mountain, be made low O valley, be raised up O mountain, be made low

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Roar! (Roar!) Roar! (Roar!) Let the Lion roar! (Roar!) Roar! (Roar!)

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: Hail, hail Lion of Judah Let the Lion roar
